title: armeria capitella
intro: Armeria capitella, also known as thymely or false thyme, is a flowering plant species within the armeria genus. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties, which can help to prevent the growth of bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of Armeria capitella include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
